- \(40 / 11 + 11 - 3 - 12 = 3.63 + 11 - 15 = 14.63 - 15 = -0.37\)

We can try another valid combination:

- \(40 + 11 - 12 - 3 = 40 + 11 - 15 = 41 - 15 = 26\)
- \(40 - 12 - 11 + 3 = 28 - 11 + 3 = 17 + 3 = 20\)
